generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see more people recognizing the importance of civil defense preparedness. It's not about fear—it's about being practical. Look at how communities with basic emergency plans handled recent disasters better than those that didn't. Why shouldn't we expect the same level of preparedness from our government? It's only fair that we have systems in place to protect ourselves, just like other countries do. #NationalSecurity #CommunityPreparedness
